memoryArtifacts.description: The Savile family began to rise in status in the mid-fourteenth century when the head of the family, Sir John Savile, married Isabel de Elland in 1353. Isabel de Elland was an heiress and the marriage …

zh.Rishworth, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭越可爾利申沃斯
zh.Rishworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾利申沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Savile於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利申沃斯時，他的父親John Savile27歲，母親Margery Joan de Bosco14歲。他於1353年之前與Isabel Eland在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年9月24日之前在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可，埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.Rishworth, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰越可爾利申沃斯
zh-hans.Rishworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾利申沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Savile于大约1325年出生在英国英格兰越可爾利申沃斯时，他的父亲John Savile27岁，母亲Margery Joan de Bosco14岁。他于1353年之前与Isabel Eland在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年9月24日之前在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可，埋葬在英国越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Savile was born about 1325, in Rishworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Savile, was 27 and his mother, Margery Joan de Bosco, was 14. He married Isabel Eland before 1353, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 24 September 1399, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Savile est né environ 1325, à Rishworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Savile, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Joan de Bosco, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Eland avant 1353, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 24 septembre 1399, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Savile um 1325 in Rishworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Savile 27 und seine Mutter Margery Joan de Bosco 14. Er hat vor 1353 in England Isabel Eland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 24. September 1399 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Savile è nato il circa 1325 nel Rishworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Savile, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery Joan de Bosco, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Eland prima del 1353, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 24 settembre 1399, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Savileが約1325年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリシュウオルスで生まれた時，父John Savileは27歳，母Margery Joan de Boscoは14歳であった。1353年以前にイギリスでIsabel Elandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年9月24日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Savile(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리슈워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Savile(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Joan de Bosco(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1353년 이전 영국에서 Isabel Eland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 9월 24일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Savile nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Rishworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Savile, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Joan de Bosco, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Eland antes 1353, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 24 de setembro de 1399, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Savile родился около 1325 г. в местности ришворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Savile было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Joan de Bosco, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Eland перед 1353 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 24 сентябрь 1399 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1325–Bef 24 September 1399: e tusa o le 1325–a'e le'I oo le 24 Setema 1399

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Savile nació aproximadamente 1325, en Rishworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Savile, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Joan de Bosco, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Isabel Eland antes de 1353, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 24 de septiembre de 1399, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
